cluster_samples.cluster_title: Notion launches agent tools for Custom Agents
core_facts: Notion introduces agent tools powered by Workers, enabling Custom Agents to perform actions beyond fixed set.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Discussion of Anthropic Mythos rollout restrictions
core_facts: Gary Marcus responds to criticism of Anthropic's AI gatekeeping, quoting a tweet about Mythos not being broadly rolled out.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: OpenShell v0.0.40 release
core_facts: NVIDIA released OpenShell v0.0.40 with new features: local-domain service routing, k8s node scheduling, CLI TLS using OS trust store, and security fixes.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Nvidia reaches $5.5T market cap
core_facts: Nvidia hits $5.5T market cap, first company to do so. CEO Jensen Huang previously said growth to $10T is inevitable.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Anthropic surpasses OpenAI in enterprise AI spending April 2026
core_facts: Anthropic surpassed OpenAI in enterprise AI spending share in April 2026: 34.4% vs 32.3%.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Notion CLI release
core_facts: Notion launches CLI for developers to work programmatically with Notion.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Notion Workers announcement
core_facts: Notion announces Workers, a hosted runtime for custom code integration.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: OpenAI Codex Windows sandbox technical blog
core_facts: OpenAI Codex team (David Wiesen) details building a Windows sandbox for Codex, starting with a non-elevated approach using write-restricted tokens and synthetic SIDs, then moving to an elevated sandbox requiring admin privileges, creating two local users for network isolation.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: PLAN0 launch by Y Combinator
core_facts: Y Combinator announces PLAN0, which converts architectural plans into cost estimates and analytics, with $20B in projects on the platform.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: YouArt launches AI film and series creation platform
core_facts: YouArt empowers storytellers to create AI films and series with leading video agents, get funded by early fans, and earn subscription revenue. Announcement by Y Combinator.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: LangChain offers free tokens and sandboxes in Fleet
core_facts: LangChain offers free tokens in Fleet powered by @FireworksAI_HQ for all Developer & Plus plans, plus sandbox access.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: LangChain announces upcoming agent-focused events
core_facts: LangChain announces upcoming events: conversation on future of agents with Andrew Ng and Harrison Chase, fireside chat with MongoDB CEO and Harrison Chase, and GenAI for clinical conversation with Abridge VP.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Codex 移动版支持 ChatGPT 远程控制
core_facts: Codex 新增移动端 ChatGPT 远程控制功能，提供设置教程。

cluster_samples.cluster_title: GitHub Copilot 桌面端技术预览版发布
core_facts: GitHub 发布 Copilot 桌面端技术预览版，需申请 waitlist。

cluster_samples.cluster_title: QVeris CLI announced
core_facts: QVeris CLI 可以将金融数据（candles, RSI, 布林带, 公司基本面）接入 Claude Code，用户可用自然语言调用。

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Stelline Developer Kit announced
core_facts: NVIDIA AI announces Stelline Developer Kit based on DGX Spark for GPU-accelerated radio astronomy, first units shipping to scientists.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Notion发布开发者平台及CLI等新功能
core_facts: Notion发布开发者平台，包括CLI、Workers、数据库同步、Agent工具等。

cluster_samples.cluster_title: 上海电信推出Token话费套餐
core_facts: 上海电信推出Token话费套餐：1元25万token，支持30+大模型，话费账单支付。

cluster_samples.cluster_title: OpenAI launches Chrome extension for Codex
core_facts: OpenAI announces Codex Chrome extension for automating repetitive browser tasks.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Codex Chrome extension available on macOS and Windows
core_facts: OpenAI announces Codex Chrome extension with background tab operation on macOS and Windows.

cluster_card.cluster_title: 田渊栋联合创立Recursive，构建递归自改进超智能
cluster_card.core_facts_json: ["田渊栋（前Meta FAIR Director）以联合创始人身份官宣新公司Recursive Superintelligence。", "公司使命是构建递归自改进超智能（Recursive Self-Improving Superintelligence）。", "Recursive已完成超6.5亿美元融资，估值约46.5亿美元，领投方包括GV、Greycroft、NVIDIA、AMD。", "Richard Socher担任CEO，联合创始人包括Tim...（完整名单待补充）。"]
